title: Phantom Community Modpack
description: Experience Minecraft like never before with our Phantom Community Modpack! Explore our server with optimized performance and technology improvements. Our modpack includes Forge mods for Minecraft 1.20.1 and 1.21.1, regular updates and a German community.
body:
The Phantom Community Modpack was developed specifically for our German community on Minecraft version 1.20.1 and now 1.21.1 and runs on a Forge Mod server (In our Case Arclight). This modpack aims to deliver an enjoyable experience by including a selection of carefully selected and tested mods that enhance gameplay.

Our features:

- Optimized performance: we've built in optimization mods to ensure smooth gameplay so you can enjoy Minecraft at its best.
- Regular updates: We strive to keep the modpack up to date. Expect timely updates. At least when all mods are running together.
- Community Improvements: This modpack includes tech and performance mods that our community suggests and loves. As a result, the game not only runs better, but also looks better and feels more realistic.
- Support and feedback: Join our Discord server to get support and play with us or just hang out with other community members. Your input helps us to continuously improve the modpack.
